title: Quant Risk Expert / Manager
description:
Responsibilities

  • Monitor exchange-wide risk exposure, including high-risk positions, abnormal markets, and liquidation activities.

  • Support margin models and liquidation logic for perpetuals and options to ensure timely and robust risk control.

  • Work with engineering teams to improve the performance, stability, and automation of the risk and liquidation systems.

  • Support risk design for new products (e.g., option strategies, structured products), including risk parameters and margin logic.

  • Assist market making and hedging strategies by monitoring performance and risk exposure.

  • Participate in testing, validation, and rollout of new risk features.

Requirements

  • 7+ years of experience in quantitative risk, trading, or derivatives/crypto markets.

  • Strong understanding of derivatives risk: margining, liquidation, perpetuals, and options.

  • Solid quantitative background (math, statistics, engineering, or finance).

  • Experience working with engineers on system or algorithmic improvements.

  • Able to analyze market data and system behavior under volatile conditions.

  • Good communication skills.

Nice to Have

  • Programming skills (Python/C++ or similar).

  • Experience with structured products or advanced option strategies.

  • Experience with exchange risk systems or liquidation engines.


    About Us

    Dada Consultants was established in 2017, with the commitment of providing the best recruitment services in Singapore. We are comprised of a dynamic head-hunting team dedicated to sourcing for highly competent professionals in IT industry. We provide enterprises with customized talent solutions, and bring talents to career advancement.

    www.dadaconsultants.com

postedCompany.description:
Do you still think the boutique agency cannot advanced your own tech recruitment career?

Join US!

We are the Singapore and China based technology recruitment agency and specialised in providing talent solution for internet and technology industry. Our client portfolio are including the global internet technology giants, technology MNC and Tech startup. Whatever technology clients you are think of? Yes we do have!

Due to confidence and client demand in Singapore, we're looking for an experienced tech recruitment Consultant to join our team to service our clients across Asia Pacific.

In this role you'll help our clients identify & hire talent people not only with the right skills and experience, but also the right motivational and cultural fit - people who'll stay and perform.
